item.title: STORM Therapeutics Funding & Trial
item.description:
• Summary: STORM Therapeutics, backed by big pharma, raises $56 million in funding and launches a Phase 2 trial for a sarcoma treatment. The company focuses on RNA-modifying therapies for cancer, aiming to advance novel oncology candidates.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech, Endpoints News

item.title: Pancreatic Cancer & Revolution Medicines
item.description:
• Summary: Revolution Medicines reports positive data in pancreatic cancer, leading to a doubled stock offering target to $2 billion. The company's therapies, potentially involving CAR-T or targeted approaches, show promise in hard-to-treat cancers like pancreatic cancer and lymphoma.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: STAT News, BioSpace

item.title: Oncology Pipeline Updates (B7-H3, Imdelltra, J&J)
item.description:
• Summary: Updates focus on B7-H3-targeted therapies, with another death in a trial putting Imdelltra combination studies in trouble, while Johnson & Johnson (J&J) achieves a significant oncology win.
  • MoAs: For B7-H3-targeted drugs: Immune checkpoint inhibitors that block B7-H3 (CD276) to enhance anti-tumor immune response. Imdelltra is likely an anti-B7-H3 monoclonal antibody.
  • Sources: ApexOnco, ApexOnco
